label: Subagent • residency handoff wraps needsHandoff kinds
query: A scripted model-swapping subagent that needs the residency handoff.
notes: Model-free. The kind sets needsHandoff=true and vends a recording handoff; the host must wrap the run through the handoff middleware (around -> body). Pins the optional-handoff contract used by the live spawn/image kinds without touching MLX.
